name: Repository Maintenance Cleanup
description: Clean up stale branches, close abandoned PRs, and maintain a healthy repository using GitHub CLI automation.

steps.title: List stale PRs with no recent activity
steps.description: Find pull requests that have not been updated recently.
steps.command: gh pr list --state open --json number,title,updatedAt --jq '.[] | select(.updatedAt < (now - 2592000 | todate)) | "#\(.number) \(.title) (updated: \(.updatedAt))"'
steps.tip: 2592000 seconds is 30 days. Adjust the number for different staleness thresholds.

steps.title: Close stale PRs with a comment
steps.description: Close abandoned PRs with a polite explanation.
steps.command: gh pr close 42 --comment 'Closing due to inactivity. Feel free to reopen if you want to continue this work.'

steps.title: Delete merged remote branches
steps.description: Remove remote branches that have already been merged.
steps.command: gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/branches --paginate --jq '.[].name' | while read branch; do gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls --jq ".[] | select(.head.ref==\"$branch\" and .merged_at!=null) | .head.ref" 2>/dev/null; done | sort -u
steps.tip: Enable 'Automatically delete head branches' in repository settings for future PRs.

steps.title: View repository statistics
steps.description: Get an overview of repository activity and health.

fullScript:
#!/bin/bash
# Repository Maintenance Cleanup
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Repository Overview ==="
gh repo view --json name,stargazerCount,forkCount --jq '"Stars: \(.stargazerCount) | Forks: \(.forkCount)"'

echo ""
echo "=== Open PRs ==="
gh pr list --state open --limit 10

echo ""
echo "=== Open Issues ==="
gh issue list --state open --limit 10

echo ""
echo "=== Maintenance Commands ==="
echo "Close stale PR:     gh pr close <number> --comment 'reason'"
echo "Close stale issue:  gh issue close <number> --comment 'reason'"
echo "Delete branch:      git push origin --delete <branch>"
echo "Archive repo:       gh repo archive"

faq.question: How do I enable automatic branch deletion after merge?
faq.answer: Go to repository Settings > General and enable 'Automatically delete head branches'. Or use: gh api -X PATCH repos/{owner}/{repo} -f delete_branch_on_merge=true

faq.question: Should I archive old repositories?
faq.answer: Yes. Archiving makes a repo read-only, preventing accidental changes. Use 'gh repo archive' for repos that are no longer actively maintained.
